calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Continued To Feb-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Melanie A. Rekieta, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Michael Brooks Carroll, individually and dba Law Offices of Michael Brooks Carroll.
Plaintiff was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jack Leahy, individually and the Media Room, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on December 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Michael Brooks Carroll, individually and dba Law Offices of Michael Brooks Carroll, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jack Leahy, individually and the Media Room, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $161,052.67.
Costs - $335.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $161,387.67.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
